mission.title: flowise: [QUESTION] Tool Agent support for chatollama
mission.description: [QUESTION] Tool Agent support for chatollama. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check Flowise setup
steps.description:
Verify your Flowise installation:
```bash
docker ps | grep flowise
```
This feature adds Tool Agent support for ChatOllama in Flowise.

steps.title: Review ChatOllama integration
steps.description:
Flowise supports ChatOllama as an LLM provider. Requirements:
1. Ollama running locally or accessible via network
2. ChatOllama node configured with the correct base URL
3. A model that supports tool/function calling

Ensure Ollama is running:
```bash
ollama list
```

steps.title: Configure Tool Agent with ChatOllama
steps.description:
In the Flowise UI:
1. Add a ChatOllama node with your Ollama server URL (default: `http://localhost:11434`)
2. Select a model that supports tool calling (e.g., llama3)
3. Connect ChatOllama to a Tool Agent node
4. Add your desired tools (e.g., Custom Tool, API Chain)

Note: Tool calling support depends on the specific Ollama model being used.

steps.title: Verify Tool Agent works
steps.description: Test the flow by sending a query that requires tool use. Confirm that the ChatOllama-powered Tool Agent correctly invokes the connected tools and returns results.

resolution.summary: Tool Agent support for ChatOllama was added to Flowise, allowing users to use Ollama-hosted models with agent workflows that include tool calling.

prerequisites.description: Flowise installed via npm or Docker, plus Ollama running locally.
